record.title: Archie Clark, 1974-04-17, Interview - MP3 Recording
record.subject: Latah County -- Idaho
record.origin: Came from the Midwest in 1904. Rosie Clark's husband

point.title: Shooting coyotes; Swede John's timber ranch
point.synopsis: Shooting coyotes at his old stand. Swede John's timber ranch.

point.title: Using dogs to hunt bobcat and coyotes
point.synopsis: Buster tracks a bobcat; skill of his hunting dogs. Practicing on a tomcat. Dogs drive coyote down the hill to his waiting gun.

point.title: Shooting matches with Clausen for chicken or geese prizes
point.synopsis: Shooting matches with Clausen for chicken or geese prizes

point.title: Hunting down a coyote with 21 hounds
point.synopsis: A hunting party with 21 hounds tracks a coyote, but Archie shoots him as he jumps a fence.

point.title: How he picks his hunting stand and it's current location
point.synopsis: How he picked his stand, by the present site of the Mountain Home Grange.

point.title: Hunting coyotes and prices on bounty versus hides
point.synopsis: Coyote runways and habits. His tame coyote bites another man. He captures pups by pulling them out of the den with a wire; got $3 for bounty, $1 for hide.

point.title: Having a pet coyote and having to kill it
point.synopsis: (continued) Taking his pet coyote plowing. Killing his pet. Coyotes have too much hell to be trained like dogs.

point.title: Reasons for him hunting; taking his wife hunting
point.synopsis: He hunted for sport, for something to do in winter. Taking his wife hunting.

point.title: Playing at dances at Deep Creek schoolhouse.
point.synopsis: Playing at dances at Deep Creek schoolhouse.

point.title: A man is bowled over by his hunting hound. Hunting with other farmers.
point.synopsis: A man is bowled over by his hunting hound. Hunting with other farmers.

point.title: Training his saddle horse to stand still and come to him.
point.synopsis: Training his saddle horse to stand still and come to him.

point.title: Shipping household items across the country; training horses
point.synopsis: Shipping the household goods and stock by train from Minnesota to Palouse. A trained colt.

record.description: Coyote hunting. A pet coyote. Training a horse. 4-17-74 1 hr
record.transcript: Download the PDF Index No transcript available.
record.rights: Digital format copyright: University of Idaho Library. Original Copyright: Latah County Historical Society
